Indicative Term Sheet — Proposed minority investment and convertible instrument between Blue Pearl Capital DIFC Ltd (Investor) and Marhala Oasis Logistics PJSC (Issuer), with Sunline Ventures ADGM SPV Ltd as co-investor.
Structure: unsecured, Shariah-compliant mandatory convertible instrument (murabaha-based note) to convert into ordinary shares of the Issuer upon agreed milestones and SCA no-objection.
Status: non-binding and illustrative; the Issuer has previously announced its intent to explore strategic financing in a public press release and no unpublished issuer information is included here.
Regulatory: subject to UAE Securities and Commodities Authority review, customary DFM/ADX disclosure standards if applicable, and corporate approvals under DIFC/ADGM company regulations.
Conditions precedent: receipt of an up-to-date trade licence copy (example label: “Trade Licence No.: TL-AD-000000”), certificate of incumbency for the ADGM SPV, and KYC/AML confirmations from an ADGM-licensed administrator.
Data protection: the parties will apply UAE PDPL principles (lawfulness, purpose limitation, data minimisation); personal data fields listed below are format examples and should not be completed in this term sheet.
Positive onboarding vignette for site access only: one operations coordinator assigned to the Issuer’s Jebel Ali yard, approximate month/year of birth 1989-04, Emirate of residence Dubai, internal role code MO-OC-7, device asset tag JAL-OPS-114, and payroll account ending 3012 at Pearl Dunes Bank; no names or Emirates ID copies to be shared at term-sheet stage.
Commercial terms: valuation methodology to be determined by an independent valuer registered in the UAE; pricing to be finalised in binding agreements and not set out here.
Governance: customary information rights, one board observer (non-voting), and negative controls on changes to constitutional documents, each subject to SCA and articles of association limits.
Use of proceeds: working capital and fleet optimisation in the UAE and GCC; no proceeds applied to related party transactions without prior Investor consent and external review.
Listing context: if conversion triggers a listing, the Issuer will consider an ADX Growth Market admission, consistent with its public corporate strategy, subject to SCA and market rules.
Form labels for CP packs (illustrative only): “Full Name: ____”, “DOB (YYYY-MM): ____”, “Nationality: ____”, “Emirates ID: ____”, “Corporate Device ID: ____”, “IBAN: ____”, “Employer: ____”, “Role Title: ____”.
Format reference only to guide data entry upon CP: Emirates ID 784-0000-0000000-0; IBAN AE00 0000 0000 0000 0000 000; Trade Licence TL-AD-000000; Corporate Account 123-000-XX; these values are non-functional placeholders.
Benign demographic placeholders (e.g., “based in the UAE”, “male/female”, “age band 30–35”) are generic and not required to identify any natural person in this term sheet.
Enquiries: investors may contact the role mailbox ir@marhalaoasis.example or use the public contact form on the Issuer’s website; no personal emails or direct lines will be used at this stage.
Governing law and forum: non-binding except for confidentiality, exclusivity, and costs; binding provisions governed by DIFC law with arbitration under DIAC rules unless the parties elect ADGM Courts in the definitive documents.
Long-stop: 90 days from receipt of SCA no-objection and completion of CP, extendable by mutual agreement without prejudice to either party’s rights.
